instruction: Manage a referral chain: your PCP referred you to a cardiologist, and the cardiologist will then refer you to a cardiac surgeon. Complete the following in order: 1) Verify the cardiology referral is approved and pre-authorization is in place, 2) Schedule the cardiologist appointment, 3) After the cardiologist visit is scheduled, verify the cardiac surgery referral and pre-authorization, 4) Schedule the cardiac surgeon appointment after the cardiologist appointment date.
